4pc.name: Striker's Gamble
4pc.description: Weapon hits increase total weapon damage by 0.65%, stacking up to 100 times. 1 stack is lost per second between 0 and 50 stacks; 2 stacks lost per second between 51 and 100 stacks.

chestTalent.name: Press the Advantage
chestTalent.description: Increases Striker's Gamble max stacks from 100 to 200. 3 stacks lost per second between 101 and 200 stacks.

backpackTalent.name: Risk Management
backpackTalent.description: Increases total weapon damage gained per stack of Striker's Gamble from 0.65% to 1%.

4pc.name: Indirect Transmission
4pc.description: Your status effects now spread on kill to all enemies within 10m and refresh 50% of the duration.

chestTalent.name: Proliferation
chestTalent.description: Increases Indirect Transmission spread range from 10m to 15m and increases the duration refresh from 50% to 75%.

backpackTalent.name: Symptom Aggravator
backpackTalent.description: Amplifies all damage dealt to status-affected targets by 30%.

bonuses.3pc: +20% Armor on Kill, +50% Health on Kill

4pc.name: Apex Predator
4pc.description: Enemies within 15m receive a debuff that amplifies your weapon damage against them by 20%. Defeating a debuffed enemy with your weapon disorts nearby enemies within 5m and increases amplified weapon damage by 5% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

chestTalent.name: Endless Hunger
chestTalent.description: Extends the duration of Apex Predator stacks from 10 seconds to 30 seconds.

backpackTalent.name: Overwhelming Force
backpackTalent.description: Increases the disorient radius from Apex Predator kills from 5m to 10m.

4pc.name: Hostile Negotiations
4pc.description: Critical hits mark enemies for 20 seconds, up to 3 marks total. When you critically hit a marked enemy, all other marked enemies take 60% of the damage dealt. Whenever a marked enemy dies, gain +2% critical hit damage, stacking up to 20 times until combat ends.

chestTalent.name: Target Rich Environment
chestTalent.description: Increases Hostile Negotiations mark count from 3 to 5.

backpackTalent.name: Critical Measures
backpackTalent.description: Increases Hostile Negotiations damage to additional marked enemies from 60% to 100%.

4pc.name: Hollow-Point Ammo
4pc.description: Shooting a status-affected enemy marks them for 10 seconds. Killing a marked enemy grants a full clip of Hollow-Point Ammo for your active weapon and half a clip to the rest of the party. Hollow-Point Ammo amplifies weapon damage by 20% and applies bleed on hit.

chestTalent.name: Parabellum Rounds
chestTalent.description: Increases Hollow-Point Ammo weapon damage amplification from 20% to 35%.

backpackTalent.name: Trauma Specialist
backpackTalent.description: Increases the duration of your bleed status effects by 50% and all bleed damage by 100%.

4pc.name: Red, White, and Blue
4pc.description: Enemies you shoot receive rotating debuffs that cycle every 2 seconds. Red: Amplifies enemy damage taken by 8%. White: Hitting the enemy restores you and allies' armor by 2% once per second. Blue: Decreases enemy damage output by 8%. Full Flag: Enemies that die while under all three debuffs simultaneously create a 5m explosion dealing damage equal to their total health and armor.

chestTalent.name: Waving the Flag
chestTalent.description: Increases Red, White, and Blue rotation speed from 2 seconds to 1.5 seconds per cycle.

backpackTalent.name: Patriotic Boost
backpackTalent.description: Increases debuff strength: Red increases from 8% to 12% amplified damage taken. White increases armor repair from 2% to 3% per second. Blue increases enemy damage reduction from 8% to 12%.

4pc.name: Ground Control
4pc.description: You and all allies gain +15% total weapon and skill damage while at full armor. When you repair an ally, you and all allies within 5m of you are also repaired for 60% of that amount.

chestTalent.name: Tactical Superiority
chestTalent.description: Increases Ground Control total weapon and skill damage bonus from +15% to +25%.

backpackTalent.name: Advanced Combat Tactics
backpackTalent.description: Increases Ground Control proximity armor repair from 60% to 120% of the amount repaired on the primary target.

4pc.name: Makeshift Repairs
4pc.description: 20% of all damage taken by you and your shield is restored as armor over 15 seconds.

chestTalent.name: Process Refinery
chestTalent.description: Reduces Makeshift Repairs restoration time from 15 seconds to 10 seconds.

backpackTalent.name: Improved Materials
backpackTalent.description: Increases Makeshift Repairs restoration from 20% to 30% of damage taken.

4pc.name: Feedback Loop
4pc.description: Whenever you use or cancel a skill, your other skill's cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds and total skill damage and repair increases by 10% for 20 seconds. Feedback Loop can trigger once every 20 seconds.

chestTalent.name: Positive Reinforcement
chestTalent.description: Increases Feedback Loop skill damage and repair bonus from +10% to +25%.

backpackTalent.name: Short Circuit
backpackTalent.description: Decreases Feedback Loop cooldown from 20 seconds to 10 seconds.

4pc.name: Heartstopper
4pc.description: Headshots apply pulse to the target for 5 seconds. Weapon hits on pulsed enemies add a stack of +1% bonus armor and +1% weapon damage to pulsed enemies. Maximum 50 stacks.

chestTalent.name: Cardiac Arrest
chestTalent.description: Increases Heartstopper maximum stacks from 50 to 100.

backpackTalent.name: Pulse Check
backpackTalent.description: Increases total bonus armor gained per stack of Heartstopper from 1% to 2%.

4pc.name: Headache
4pc.description: First consecutive headshot with a Marksman Rifle increases next headshot damage by 20%. Second consecutive headshot grants +10% bonus armor (up to 50% of max armor). Third consecutive headshot refills the magazine. From the fourth headshot onward, all three bonuses activate simultaneously on each consecutive headshot kill.

chestTalent.name: Stand Tall
chestTalent.description: Increases Headache bonus armor from 50% to 100% of max armor value.

backpackTalent.name: Lucky
backpackTalent.description: Allows you to miss one headshot before resetting the Headache consecutive headshot cycle.

4pc.name: Dead Man's Hand
4pc.description: Rifle and Marksman Rifle shots flip cards. After revealing five cards, your next shot is amplified by 30% damage. Additional amplified shots are granted based on the poker hand revealed: Aces and Eights (2 shots), Full House (3 shots), Four of a Kind (4 shots). Headshots grant an extra card flip, accelerating hand building.

chestTalent.name: No Limit
chestTalent.description: Increases Dead Man's Hand damage amplification from 30% to 50%.

backpackTalent.name: Ace in the Sleeve
backpackTalent.description: Grants one additional amplified shot when revealing your hand.

4pc.name: On Point
4pc.description: Hitting a shot with a Rifle or Marksman Rifle grants a stack. Reloading converts stacks into a temporary buff providing +2% Weapon Handling and +4% Weapon Damage per stack for 10 seconds.

chestTalent.name: Point of no Return
chestTalent.description: Increases On Point buff duration from 10 seconds to 15 seconds.

backpackTalent.name: Point of Honor
backpackTalent.description: Increases On Point Weapon Damage bonus per stack from +4% to +6%.

4pc.name: Hackstep Protocol
4pc.description: Replaces armor kits with an instant, infinite-use ability on a 20-second cooldown that repairs 20% of your armor, grants 50% bonus armor, and hides your nameplate for 5 seconds. Increases total weapon damage by 1% per 5% bonus armor gained, up to 20%.

chestTalent.name: Compiler Optimization
chestTalent.description: Decreases Hackstep Protocol cooldown from 20 seconds to 15 seconds.

backpackTalent.name: Multithreaded Execution
backpackTalent.description: Increases Hackstep Protocol bonus armor from 50% to 100%.

4pc.name: Aggressive Recon
4pc.description: Dealing damage with a Signature Weapon increases total weapon damage by 20% for 60 seconds. Automatically generate Specialization ammo every 60 seconds.

chestTalent.name: Specialized Destruction
chestTalent.description: Increases Aggressive Recon weapon damage bonus from 20% to 40%.

backpackTalent.name: Signature Moves
backpackTalent.description: Increases signature weapon damage by 20% and doubles the amount of Specialization ammo generated by Aggressive Recon.

4pc.name: Charging / Charged
4pc.description: Charging: For each second spent out of cover during combat, gain 5% reduced incoming damage, up to a maximum of 50%. Charged: While fully charged, gain immunity to all movement speed debuffs and share your Hazard Protection and incoming damage reduction with all allies for 10 seconds. After Charged is consumed, Charging resumes if still in combat out of cover.

chestTalent.name: Overcharging
chestTalent.description: Increases Charging maximum incoming damage protection from 50% to 70%.

backpackTalent.name: Safe Charging
backpackTalent.description: Charging accumulates protection at 10% per second instead of 5% per second, halving time to reach maximum charge.

4pc.name: Stoic
4pc.description: Gain +3% Damage Resistance for every enemy that is targeting you. The bonus is multiplied by 1.X, where X equals the number of agents in your group.

chestTalent.name: Deceit
chestTalent.description: Enemies targeting your Decoy skill also count towards the Stoic Damage Resistance bonus.

backpackTalent.name: Polyethylene Plating
backpackTalent.description: Increases the Stoic Damage Resistance bonus per targeting enemy from 3% to 4%.

4pc.name: From the Shadows into the Light
4pc.description: In Cover: Accumulate up to 50 stacks per second; each stack increases critical hit damage by 1% and RPM by 0.3%. The buff does not apply while actively shooting from cover. Out of Cover: Gain 10 stacks per second (up to 50); each stack grants 0.8% armor regeneration consumed at 10 stacks/second when returning to cover.

chestTalent.name: From the Shadows
chestTalent.description: Increases the out-of-cover stacking to a maximum of 100 stacks (from 50), stack gain from 10 to 20 per second, and stack consumption from 10 to 20 per second.

backpackTalent.name: Into the Light
backpackTalent.description: Increases the in-cover stacking to a maximum of 100 stacks (from 50), stack gain from 10 to 20 per second, and stack consumption from 10 to 20 per second.

4pc.name: Tend and Befriend
4pc.description: Interacting with your deployed skills grants that skill +25% skill damage for 10 seconds. Interactions include deploying, using, or changing the skill's target. This buff cannot be refreshed or stacked.

chestTalent.name: Best Buds
chestTalent.description: Increases the Tend and Befriend skill damage buff from +25% to +50%.

backpackTalent.name: Complete Uptime
backpackTalent.description: Cancelling your skills resets their cooldown. If the skill is destroyed instead of cancelled, the reset does not occur.

4pc.name: Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype
4pc.description: The Incinerator Turret now rotates a full 360 degrees. You are immune to your own Incinerator Turret's fire. The Incinerator Turret explodes when disabled.

chestTalent.name: Chain Combustion
chestTalent.description: Enemies set ablaze by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype ignite other enemies within 2m.

backpackTalent.name: Heatstroke
backpackTalent.description: Grants +25% weapon damage against burning targets. Additionally grants +25% Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype range.

4pc.name: Return to Sender
4pc.description: PvE: Receive repairs equal to 10% of the damage dealt by your Skills. Allies receive repairs equal to 20% of the damage dealt by your Skills. PvP: Receive repairs equal to 5% of the damage dealt by your Skills. Allies receive repairs equal to 10% of the damage dealt by your Skills.

chestTalent.name: Increased Interest
chestTalent.description: PvE: Increases repairs received by you from Return to Sender from 10% to 15%, and repairs to allies from 20% to 30%. PvP: Increases repairs to you from 5% to 10%, and to allies from 10% to 20%.

backpackTalent.name: Over-engineered
backpackTalent.description: While at full Armor, repairs received from Return to Sender provide Bonus Armor instead, up to 80% of Total Armor. Does not apply to allies.

4pc.name: Symphony
4pc.description: Killing an enemy beyond 25m grants: +40% weapon damage to Shotguns, SMGs, and Pistols; +20% weapon damage to ARs and LMGs; +25% Bonus Armor for 15 seconds. Killing an enemy within 25m grants: +40% weapon damage to MMRs and Rifles; +20% weapon damage to ARs and LMGs; +30% Headshot Damage for 15 seconds. Alternating kills from both ranges builds stacks. At 4 stacks, all bonuses are multiplied by 1.5 and triggered simultaneously for 15 seconds.

chestTalent.name: Fortissimo
chestTalent.description: Doubles all Weapon Damage bonuses granted by Symphony.

backpackTalent.name: Accelerando
backpackTalent.description: Decreases the number of alternating-range stacks needed to trigger the Symphony double-buff from 4 to 3.
